questions: Does the patient present with symptoms of DM (polyuria, polydipsia, unexplained weight loss, glycosuria, ketonuria)? (Yes/No)
What is the patient's random plasma glucose level (mg/dl)?
What is the patient's fasting plasma glucose level (mg/dl)?
What is the patient's 2-hour plasma glucose level during OGTT (mg/dl)?
Is the patient newly diagnosed with DM or recovering from DKA? (Yes/No)
Is the patient being discharged from the hospital? (Yes/No)
What is the patient's total daily insulin dose (units)?
What are the patient's blood glucose levels before meals? (mg/dl)
What are the patient's blood glucose levels after meals? (mg/dl)
What is the patient's early morning (3 AM) blood glucose level? (mg/dl)
What is the patient's HbA1c level (%)?
What are the patient's serum lipid levels (cholesterol, HDL, LDL, VLDL, triglycerides)? (mg/dl)
Is there protein in the patient's urine? (Yes/No)
What are the patient's thyroid function test results?
Does the patient have any allergies? (Yes/No)
